docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JARJOURA, TANIA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JARJOURA, TANIA AS TO DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JARJOURA, TANIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT MADE MISREPRESENTATION IN INDUCING HER TO PURCHASE THE TREATMENTS OR THAT DEFENDANT NEGLIGENTLY OR OTHERWISE INAPPROPRIATELY PERFORMED THE TREATMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-03-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ESMERALDA MARTINEZ FILED BY DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AMANDA HOLMES FILED BY DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY JARJOURA, TANIA LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. ESMERALDA MARTINEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TANIA JARJOURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC. IS PRESENT AND APPEARING IN COURT IS AMANDA HOLMES. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
OPPOSITION TO REMOTE PROCEEDING AT EVIDENTIARY HEARING OR TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JARJOURA, TANIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $929.00 FILED BY JARJOURA, TANIA AS TO DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
